dispatcher_config.stop_tokens_note: Qwen-native stop tokens; matched to model family

regression_note: No regression from 0.2.14 W1.5 baseline. All 3 probes pass identically to W1.5 behavior.

probe_a_identity.prompt: Respond with your model name and nothing else.
probe_a_identity.notes: Correct model name, no extra content, no template tokens

probe_b_structured.prompt: Return a JSON object with fields "name" (string), "count" (integer), "items" (list of strings). Use name="test", count=3, items=["a","b","c"]. Return only the JSON, no other text.
probe_b_structured.notes: Exact JSON, no wrapping prose, no template tokens, schema match

probe_c_language.prompt: Briefly describe the ACID properties of a database transaction. Respond in English only.
probe_c_language.raw_response_excerpt: The **ACID** properties define the reliability and safety of a database transaction: ...
probe_c_language.notes: English throughout, on-topic, no language drift
